response:
WITH conductor_orchestra_counts AS (
    SELECT
        c.name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.orchestra_id) AS num_orchestras
    FROM conductors c
    INNER JOIN performances p ON c.conductor_id = p.conductor_id
    GROUP BY c.conductor_id, c.name
)
SELECT name
FROM conductor_orchestra_counts
WHERE num_orchestras = (SELECT MAX(num_orchestras) FROM conductor_orchestra_counts);
